I think DSC gives you more options than D&D. The things that counter D&D are incidental and happen a decent amount, and D&D is just a stopgap measure for your weakness without actually doing anything about it. 

DSC counters things that get set up in your face that become a problem like Counter or Fortress, you can throw it on Mouchette or Tinct as a fake, and since this is a suicide comp you can get away with not using a WoD on every character a little more easily
